data_disclaimer: Prototype only. Demo/research data may be delayed, incomplete, synthetic, or not licensed for production use. Not investment advice. Not for trading, regulatory disclosure, client reporting, redistribution, or NAV/PCF production.
source_warnings: Yahoo Finance test feed via yfinance. Local testing only; confirm Yahoo terms before any redistribution.
Yahoo Finance charts use one-month close/volume history; ETF NAV history, PCF, and bid-ask history remain proxy fields.

rule_catalog.label: Tracking difference warning
rule_catalog.description: Absolute ETF-vs-benchmark tracking difference exceeds warning threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Review performance attribution and check cash, fee, FX, dividend, sampling, and corporate-action effects.

rule_catalog.label: Tracking difference action required
rule_catalog.description: Absolute ETF-vs-benchmark tracking difference exceeds action threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Escalate to PM review and confirm whether operational or market microstructure issues explain the gap.

rule_catalog.label: Premium/discount warning
rule_catalog.description: ETF premium/discount exceeds internal warning threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Review underlying market status, NAV timestamp, AP activity, spread, and quote quality.

rule_catalog.label: Spread widened
rule_catalog.description: Bid-ask spread exceeds internal warning threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Check market-maker quote quality, underlying liquidity, and recent flows.

rule_catalog.label: Low ETF volume
rule_catalog.description: ETF volume ratio vs 20-day average is below warning threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Review secondary-market liquidity and recent investor flow context.

rule_catalog.label: High realized volatility
rule_catalog.description: Realized volatility z-score exceeds warning threshold.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Review market regime, exposure concentration, and stress indicators.

rule_catalog.label: Corporate action unresolved
rule_catalog.description: At least one corporate-action event affecting ETF holdings is unresolved.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Confirm event treatment, index treatment, NAV impact, and PCF/basket impact.

rule_catalog.label: PCF stale
rule_catalog.description: PCF age is greater than zero days.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Verify PCF publication status and resolve stale basket issue.

rule_catalog.label: Data-quality gap
rule_catalog.description: Critical fields are missing or stale.
rule_catalog.suggested_action: Inspect source registry, refresh snapshot, or mark source limitation.

events.title: Yahoo Finance test feed uses close/ohlc proxies only
events.suggested_workflow: Use this feed only for local testing; do not publish or redistribute without confirming data rights.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Source refresh and rights check
workflow_checkpoints.action: Confirm source freshness, Yahoo/yfinance usage boundary, and redistribution limits before publishing.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Rule exception triage
workflow_checkpoints.summary: 46 open workflow tickets across 35 monitored ETFs.
workflow_checkpoints.action: Review red tickets first, then assign yellow tickets to owner queues with evidence IDs attached.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Capital markets liquidity review
workflow_checkpoints.summary: 21 spread, premium/discount, or volume tickets need market-quality review.
workflow_checkpoints.action: Review quote quality, secondary-market volume, and proxy premium/discount context.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Data quality attestation
workflow_checkpoints.summary: 0 ETFs have missing critical fields; 2 source warnings remain visible.
workflow_checkpoints.action: Use the Data Quality page to confirm missing fields, stale fields, source tags, and evidence coverage.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Evidence pack completeness
workflow_checkpoints.summary: 27 unique evidence IDs support open tickets.
workflow_checkpoints.action: Confirm every ticket, event, and workflow claim links back to evidence before handoff.

workflow_checkpoints.label: Operational publish readiness
workflow_checkpoints.summary: 7 red tickets and 46 total tickets before close-of-day handoff.
workflow_checkpoints.action: Hold operational sign-off until red tickets have owner review and evidence-backed next steps.

workflow_queues.next_action: Escalate to PM review and confirm whether operational or market microstructure issues explain the gap.
Check market-maker quote quality, underlying liquidity, and recent flows.

copilot_summaries.label: Internal draft · evidence-based · prototype only
copilot_summaries.summary: As of 2026-06-14, ETF Tower monitors 35 ETFs. 7 are red, 20 are yellow, and 46 tickets are open. The highest-priority issue is TRACKING_DIFF_RED affecting USO. Suggested next check: Escalate to PM review and confirm whether operational or market microstructure issues explain the gap. Evidence: evd_metric_uso.
recommended_checks: Escalate to PM review and confirm whether operational or market microstructure issues explain the gap.
